name: Cold Outreach Sequence
description: 4-step sequence for new leads with no prior contact

steps.subject: Personalized intro email
steps.description: Introduce the brand, reference the recipient's business, and offer value

steps.subject: Follow-up with value proposition
steps.description: Share a specific benefit or result relevant to the recipient's industry

steps.subject: Case study or social proof
steps.description: Share a success story from a similar business

steps.subject: Break-up email
steps.description: Final touchpoint — acknowledge silence, leave the door open
